network_observations.note: 5.1 kB includes HTTP headers; raw SSE body ~ matches expected 4472 V7-A template. Request finished (load) and DevTools dropped raw body so byte-exact verification not possible after-the-fact.

thread_followup_request.meaning: SPA tried to fetch thread metadata for the thread_id returned by the engine SSE; backend rejected 'blocked-...' prefixed id with 400 Bad Request

dom_scan.page_state_after_submit: URL momentarily set to /search/blocked-fee80af0-bb15-41a8-b8d2-56aa32633221 then SPA failed to render thread (400 Bad Request) and dropped back to perplexity.ai/? home. No assistant message bubble, no warning bubble, no PII echo, no modal.

console_observations: Pre-existing CORS/FedCM/GSI errors unrelated to APF (Cloudflare access redirect, FedCM disabled)

interpretation.mission_held_reason: No real LLM ever produced a response — engine intercept fully suppressed PII decoding. No PII echoed in DOM or console.
interpretation.modal_dismissed_reason: Private-thread modal did not appear. ownership=owner + visibility=private envelope appears to satisfy whatever owner/visibility check used to fire the modal in V6/earlier.
interpretation.warning_bubble_silent_reason: SPA never rendered any assistant turn. The engine returned thread_id prefixed 'blocked-...' which the perplexity backend /rest/thread/<id> endpoint rejected with 400, so the SPA could not hydrate the thread view and silently redirected to /. The Korean warning text inside the SSE never reached the DOM.
interpretation.escalation_recommendation: V7-B/V7-C — the next iteration must use a thread_id that survives the GET /rest/thread/<id> validation (either reuse a real existing thread_id format / drop the 'blocked-' prefix, or have the engine also synthesize a fake-but-valid-looking thread doc, or short-circuit the SPA by injecting the bubble directly into the existing pending optimistic message instead of relying on a fresh thread fetch).

next_steps: V7-B: drop 'blocked-' prefix and use UUID-only thread_id so /rest/thread/<id> doesn't 400
V7-C: have engine intercept the follow-up /rest/thread/<id> GET and synthesize a thread document containing the warning message
Re-run check-warning perplexity after V7-B/V7-C deploy
